title: Create: Tuff Enough
description: Adds 17 balanced Create recipes built around Tuff and volcanic processes to make rare resources like Diamonds and Ancient Debris automatable.
body:
Create: Tuff Enough is a simple Create addon that adds 17 balanced recipes to make resources renewable and automatable.

Tuff, Deepslate, Netherrack, all Create building stones, and even rare items like Diamonds and Ancient Debris can now be produced using Create machines. No new blocks, no new items, just recipes.

Rare resources like Diamond and Ancient Debris require Superheated setups and have low drop chances, so don't expect to get rich quick.

Recipe List

Compacting

  • Andesite x2, Gravel x2 and Lava → Tuff
  • Cobblestone x4 and Lava → Deepslate x2
  • Gravel and Bone Meal → Calcite
  • Calcite and Sand → Limestone
  • Netherrack, Cobblestone and Lava → Scoria
  • Zinc Nugget, Gravel and Water → Asurine
  • Iron Nugget, Gravel and Lava → Crimsite
  • Gold Nugget, Gravel and Lava → Ochrum
  • Copper Nugget, Gravel and Lava → Veridium
  • Coal Block and Lava → Diamond (rare, superheated)
  • Gold Block x2 and Lava → Ancient Debris (extremely rare, superheated)

Mixing

  • Cobblestone and Lava → Netherrack (heated)
  • Blue Dye x2, Calcite and Gold Nugget → Lapis Lazuli (heated)

Haunting

  • Charcoal → Coal
  • Scoria → Scorchia

Crushing

  • Tuff → Gold Nugget (rare) and Raw Copper (rare)

Milling

  • Dried Kelp Block → String x4

More recipes may be added in future updates.
